seo.title: Luma Spa | Exquisite Foot & Body Massage in Da Nang
seo.description: Experience professional foot and body massage services in Da Nang. Cozy atmosphere and dedicated therapists at Luma Spa.

hero.subtitle: WELCOME TO
hero.title: Luma Spa
hero.description: Where soul and body find a gentle harmony between exquisite space and intensive therapeutic techniques.

services.label: SERVICES
services.title: Care Experiences at Luma Spa
services.description: Discover relaxation treatments designed to help your body unwind, regenerate energy, and enjoy complete care in a cozy, sophisticated space.

item_1.title: Professional Therapists
item_1.desc: Well-trained team with deep knowledge of acupoints and intensive massage therapy techniques.

item_2.title: Exquisite Space
item_2.desc: A blend of traditional and modern architecture, providing a cozy, private, and relaxing atmosphere.

item_3.title: Natural Products
item_3.desc: We use 100% natural essential oils and herbs, absolutely safe for your health.

item_4.title: Personalized Experience
item_4.desc: Each client receives a consultation for a customized treatment plan tailored to their health condition.

customer_1.content: I was recommended by an acquaintance. We had a group of 4. The salt rock sauna is spacious and comfortable. The staff's service attitude is excellent.
customer_1.author: Tran Nhat Anh

customer_2.content: Professional therapists and extremely clean facilities. The salt rock sauna is a must-try. Best relaxation in Da Nang!
customer_2.author: James Wilson

customer_3.content: 岘港最好的水疗中心。环境优雅，技术专业. 强烈推荐给寻找高品质体验의游客。
customer_3.author: Li Wei

customer_4.content: 다낭에서 가장 만족스러운 스파였습니다. 소금방이 매우 넓고 쾌적하며 직원들이 친절합니다.
customer_4.author: Park Ji-hye

quality.title: Intensive Techniques
quality.desc: Commitment to bringing visible therapeutic effects from the very first session.

organic.title: Natural Herbs
organic.desc: Using 100% pure essential oils and precious herbs from nature.

service.title: Dedicated Service
service.desc: Absolute customer satisfaction and relaxation is Luma's top priority.
